meta.title: Alberto García | Mobile Apps, Websites & Custom Systems · Monterrey

hero.seoTitle: I'm a Senior React Native, Next.js and Full Stack Web Engineer

personal.intro: Software engineer with 6 years of experience building mobile apps, websites and custom systems. Currently tech lead of the "I Love St. Jude" fundraising app, and creator of websites with bookings and online payments for businesses like La Casa de Chuy el Rico.

items.title: Mobile Development
items.description: Expert in React Native development with 6 years of experience building scalable, secure mobile applications for fintech and enterprise solutions.

items.title: Web & Custom Systems
items.description: Websites and business systems with Next.js — bookings, online payments and admin dashboards, from idea to production launch.

items.title: Technical Leadership
items.description: Led teams of 6+ developers, managing code reviews, PR processes, and ensuring quality delivery through agile methodologies and best practices.

items.title: Mobile Security
items.description: Specialized in implementing biometric authentication, MFA, encryption, and security measures for fintech applications.

edu.title: B.S. in Computer Science
edu.description: Computer Science degree focused on software engineering, algorithms, and modern application development.

edu.title: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner (CLF-C02)
edu.description: Foundational AWS certification covering cloud concepts, security, architecture, and pricing.

edu.title: React and TypeScript: Build a Portfolio Project
edu.description: Hands-on course building production-ready apps with React and TypeScript best practices.

exp.title: Senior Software Engineer
exp.org: St. Jude Children's Research Hospital (via Concentrix)
exp.description: Tech lead for the "I Love St. Jude" app, a fundraising platform where people donate, join charity events and build community for the children's hospital. Built the project's architecture from scratch in React Native and TypeScript, with Okta authentication and AWS EC2 infrastructure.

exp.title: Full Stack Developer — Freelance Project
exp.org: La Casa de Chuy el Rico
exp.description: Built lacasadechuyelrico.com end-to-end as a personal project: a booking site for a photography venue in Monterrey specializing in quinceañera and wedding photo sessions. Hourly reservations with date selection, online payments through Conekta and instant confirmation. Built with Next.js, TypeScript and Supabase, deployed on Vercel with cron jobs and a custom domain — reaching 600+ users per week.

exp.title: Senior Mobile Developer → Mobile Tech Lead
exp.description: Led mobile development of Vit by Vector, a financial marketplace (mutual funds, stocks, insurance, retirement). Managed a Scrum team of 6, reviewing 15–20 PRs/week and shipping stable bi-weekly releases. Implemented Face ID, MFA, AES-256 encryption, jailbreak/root detection and an AI chatbot. Previously built VectorApp, reducing operation times by 20%.

exp.title: Web Developer
exp.description: Built an internal portal with Angular within a Scrum team and automated mobile testing with Appium and Selenium.

exp.title: Web Developer — Freelance
exp.description: My first freelance client: built and maintained their e-commerce platform with PayPal integration, applying UX principles that increased conversion rate by 15%.

footer.intro: Have a mobile app or website in mind? I help you take it from idea to launch. Reach out and let's get started.

personal.intro: Software engineer with 6 years of experience across mobile and web: React Native apps, websites and custom systems built with Next.js. I currently lead the "I Love St. Jude" fundraising app, and as a freelancer I build complete products — like La Casa de Chuy el Rico, a booking website with online payments and 600+ weekly users. I lead agile teams, raise delivery quality through testing and code reviews, and have contributed 2,100+ commits and PRs.
